<?php /** * This file has been @generated by a phing task by {@link GeneratePhonePrefixData}. * See [README.md](README.md#generating-data) for more information. * * Pull requests changing data in these files will not be accepted. See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 4121 => 'Losanna', 4122 => 'Ginevra', 4126 => 'Friburgo', 4131 => 'Berna', 4132 => 'Bienne/Neuchâtel/Soletta/Giura', 4141 => 'Lucerna', 4143 => 'Zurigo', 4144 => 'Zurigo', 4161 => 'Basilea', 4171 => 'San Gallo', 4181 => 'Coira', ];
